theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (f : α → β)
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) :
    ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro hf

  exact hxy (hf hfxy)

theorem nat_strong_induction {P : ℕ → Prop} (h0 : P 0) (ih : ∀ n, (∀ m, m < n → P m) → P n) :
    ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn
  case zero => exact h0
  case succ n ih' => exact ih n ih'
after_snippet:

theorem nat_strong_induction {P : ℕ → Prop} (h0 : P 0) (ih : ∀ n, (∀ m, m < n → P m) → P n) :
    ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strongRecOn
  case ind n ih' => exact ih n ih'
